title: Post-083 Disjoint-Scope Simultaneous-Worker Readiness Verdict
objective: Record the post-publication readiness verdict for whether a later simultaneous multi-worker source/test pilot packet can be explicitly authored, without opening execution in this tranche.
verdict_summary: A later simultaneous-worker execution packet is now authorable in planning terms because the decomposed validation surface is published and Packet 082's apparatus, relay, coordinator, non-overlap, validation, conflict, and abort rules are published. Actual simultaneous-worker execution remains closed until that later execution packet is explicitly authored and opened.
authorable_conditions: The later execution packet must define exactly two mutation workers: one apparatus worker and one relay worker.

The apparatus worker may own only `apps/operations-web/app/apparatus-resource-explorer.tsx`, `apps/operations-web/lib/apparatus-resources.ts`, and `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.apparatus.smoke.spec.ts` unless a new planning packet changes the slice.

The relay worker may own only `apps/operations-web/app/relay-resource-explorer.tsx`, `apps/operations-web/app/relay-selection-panels.tsx`, `apps/operations-web/lib/relay-resources.ts`, and `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.relay.smoke.spec.ts` unless a new planning packet changes the slice.
The coordinator must own governance, publication, host reconciliation, static-surfaces validation, app-wide layout/style/config, package files, and lockfiles.

Any shared-file, package/toolchain, runtime/service, install, migration, remote-rewrite, rollback, force/reset/clean, old-clone, or static-surfaces worker need must abort the later simultaneous-worker packet.
Validation must include no-install diff hygiene, workstation typecheck, workstation build, and focused Playwright over apparatus, relay, and static-surfaces specs before any publication decision.
Publication and host reconciliation must remain a separate coordinator-owned gate after validation and explicit publication/defer decision.
readiness_upgrade: The specific Packet 070 blocker is resolved and published.
The Packet 082 disjoint-scope planning rules are published at `adf4994df0b1504d995776dcb5be64220cc16d6b`.
A later simultaneous-worker execution packet can now be authored if it preserves the published rules exactly.
closed_boundaries: simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution in this tranche
second mutation worker execution in this tranche
next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 085 - Packet 083 And Packet 084 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
sql_permission_note: This verdict packet authorizes no database writes and no source/test execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation in this tranche, second-worker execution in this tranche, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
